title: Dry Bulk 1Q26 Momentum To Mayhem
summary:
Main
The dry bulk market entered 2026 with remarkable momentum, delivering a broadly robust performance across all vessel classes in the first two months of the year. From Capesizes to Handysizes, spot rates trended higher on a year-on-year basis, supported by sustained strength even through the typically quieter Chinese New Year period. By the end of February, sentiment had turned decisively bullish, with market participants projecting strong earnings across 2Q-4Q 2026.
